@graph.name: TOPDRIVE® VFD EMC ROZ1-K 0.6/1kV
@graph.description: Flexible LSZH screened cable for Variable Frequency Drive cables (VFD cables). ACCORDING TO: IEC 60502-1 / IEC 60092-353. TOPDRIVE® VFD (EMC) ROZ1-K (AS) cable has been specially designed for Variable Frequency Drive Motors and installations where it is necessary to limit the effects of electromagnetic interference (EMI). This is a flexible cable for fixed installations, for variable speed motors or pumps.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Industrial Projects)

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - TOPDRIVE® VFD EMC ROZ1-K 0.6/1kV
subjectOf.description: Complete technical specifications, engineering data and certifications for the cable.

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Electrolytic annealed copper, class 5 (flexible) according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: Cross-linked polyethylene type XLPE according to IEC 60502-1, type HF XLPE 90°C according to IEC 60092-360

additionalProperty.name: Outer Sheath
additionalProperty.value: Polyolefin type ST8 according to IEC 60502-1 and type SHF1 according to IEC 60092-360

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Service Temperature
additionalProperty.value: -40 (fixed and protected installations)

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Installation Temperature
additionalProperty.value: 0 (on cable surface)

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 / IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: Fire Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Fire non-propagation according to EN 60332-3 / IEC 60332-3 and EN 50399

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: Cca-s1a, d1, a1 according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Halogen Free
additionalProperty.value: Low Smoke Halogen Free according to EN 60754-1 / IEC 60754-1

additionalProperty.name: Low Corrosive Gases Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low corrosive gases emission according to EN 60754-2 / IEC 60754-2

additionalProperty.name: Low Smoke Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke emission according to EN 61034 / IEC 61034

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 10x cable diameter

additionalProperty.name: Impact Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AG2 Medium severity

additionalProperty.name: Chemical & Oil Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Acceptable

additionalProperty.name: UV Resistance
additionalProperty.value: UV Resistant according to EN 50618

additionalProperty.name: Water Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AD5 Jets

additionalProperty.name: Installation Conditions
additionalProperty.value: Open Air, Buried, In conduit

additionalProperty.name: Standards and Approvals
additionalProperty.value: BUREAU VERITAS, DNV-GL, ABS, LLOYD'S REGISTER, RoHS, CE

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: Variable Frequency Drives, Industrial motors, Pumps, EMC sensitive installations
